member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IEventBroker
member.summary: In-process event broker used to signal waiting workflow instances. For cross-process signalling, events are persisted via .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IEventBroker.PublishAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event, waking any subscribed waiters immediately.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IEventBroker.SubscribeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribes to a specific event. Returns when the event is received or the token is cancelled.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflow`1
member.summary: Defines a workflow with a specific data type. Implement this interface to declare the steps and flow of a workflow.
member.typeparam: The strongly-typed data payload carried through this workflow.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflow`1.Name
member.summary: Gets the unique name identifying this workflow definition.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflow`1.Version
member.summary: Gets the version of this workflow definition. Defaults to 1.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflow`1.Build(SagaNet.Core.Builder.IWorkflowBuilder{`0})
member.summary: Builds the workflow step graph using the provided builder.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowHost
member.summary: The workflow host manages starting, resuming, and publishing events to workflows.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowHost.StartWorkflowAsync``2(``1,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a new workflow instance and persists it, ready for execution.
member.returns: The newly created workflow instance ID.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowHost.PublishEventAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes an event that can resume a workflow waiting on that event.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowHost.TerminateWorkflowAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Terminates a running workflow instance.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that wraps step execution. Chain multiple middleware to add cross-cutting concerns such as retry, logging, metrics, and distributed tracing.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowMiddleware.InvokeAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.MiddlewareContext,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult}})
member.summary: Called to execute the next element in the middleware pipeline.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRegistry
member.summary: Registry that holds compiled objects, keyed by workflow name and version.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRegistry.Register``2
member.summary: Registers a workflow definition.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRegistry.Find(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Looks up a workflow definition by name and version.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRegistry.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all registered definitions.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository
member.summary: Persistence contract for workflow instances and execution pointers.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.CreateInstanceAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new workflow instance and returns it with its assigned ID.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.GetInstanceAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a workflow instance by ID. Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.TryAcquireInstanceAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Atomically acquires a workflow instance for execution (sets status to Running using optimistic concurrency). Returns null if the instance was claimed by another host.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.UpdateInstanceAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes to an existing workflow instance.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.GetRunnableInstanceIdsAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a batch of runnable workflow instance IDs (status = Runnable, NextExecutionTime <= now) up to .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.PublishEventAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowEvent,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores a publishable event for waiting workflows to consume.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowRepository.ConsumeEventsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves and marks unconsumed events matching name+key. Marks them consumed atomically.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowStep`1
member.summary: A single executable unit of work within a workflow.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.IWorkflowStep`1.RunAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext{`0})
member.summary: Executes the step logic. Returns an describing how the workflow should proceed after this step.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.ICompensatableStep`1
member.summary: A workflow step that supports saga compensation (rollback). Implement this when the step performs a side-effect that must be undone on failure.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Abstractions.ICompensatableStep`1.CompensateAsync(SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext{`0})
member.summary: Executes the compensating (rollback) action for this step. Called automatically when a later step fails and saga compensation is triggered.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IWorkflowBuilder`1
member.summary: Fluent API for composing a workflow's step graph.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IWorkflowBuilder`1.StartWith``1
member.summary: Adds the first step in the workflow.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IWorkflowBuilder`1.StartWith``1(System.String)
member.summary: Adds the first step with a descriptive name.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IWorkflowBuilder`1.Build(System.String,System.Int32,System.Type)
member.summary: Builds and returns the final .

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2
member.summary: Fluent configuration for an individual workflow step.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.Then``1
member.summary: Appends the next step in the linear sequence.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.Then``1(System.String)
member.summary: Appends the next step with a descriptive name.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.CompensateWith``1
member.summary: Specifies a compensating step type to run if this step (or any later step) fails. The compensating step must implement .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.WithRetry(SagaNet.Core.Models.RetryPolicy)
member.summary: Attaches a per-step retry policy, overriding the global default.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.WithRetry(System.Action{SagaNet.Core.Builder.RetryPolicyBuilder})
member.summary: Attaches a per-step retry policy via a builder delegate.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.IStepBuilder`2.WithDescription(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a human-readable description to the step for tooling/logging.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Builder.RetryPolicyBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.WorkflowBuilder`1.AddForwardStep``1(SagaNet.Core.Builder.WorkflowBuilder{`0}.MutableStepDefinition,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a step in the forward flow after . Called by StepBuilder.Then() — links predecessor → new step.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Builder.WorkflowBuilder`1.AddCompensationStep``1(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a compensation-only step (not wired into the forward flow). Returns its index.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Diagnostics.SagaNetDiagnostics
member.summary: OpenTelemetry instrumentation for SagaNet. Exposes an for distributed tracing and a for metrics.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Engine.SagaCompensator
member.summary: Walks backward through completed steps and calls their compensation actions when a saga failure is detected.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Engine.SagaCompensator.CompensateAsync``1(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance,SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Compensates all completed steps in reverse order. Returns true if all compensations succeeded; false if any failed.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Engine.StepExecutor
member.summary: Resolves the step type from DI, builds the execution context, and runs the step through the .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Engine.StepExecutor.ExecuteAsync``1(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance,SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowDefinition,SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition,SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a step and returns the raw .

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Engine.StepExecutor.CompensateAsync``1(SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance,SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition,SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the compensation action of a compensatable step.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Engine.WorkflowExecutor
member.summary: Advances a single workflow instance by one step tick. Called repeatedly by until the workflow reaches a terminal state.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Engine.WorkflowExecutor.ExecuteAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes one tick of the given workflow instance. All mutations are persisted before returning.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Engine.WorkflowHost
member.summary: that continuously polls for runnable workflow instances and dispatches them to with configurable concurrency. Also handles external event delivery to waiting workflows.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Events.InMemoryEventBroker
member.summary: In-process event broker backed by . Suitable for single-host deployments. For multi-host deployments, events are persisted via and polled by the host — no additional broker is required.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Middleware.MiddlewarePipeline
member.summary: Builds and executes a chain of around a step delegate.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Middleware.ObservabilityMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that records structured logs, distributed traces (OpenTelemetry), and metrics for every step execution.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Middleware.RetryMiddleware
member.summary: Converts unhandled exceptions thrown by a step into a (up to ) or a when the limit is exceeded.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer
member.summary: Tracks the execution state of a single step within a workflow instance. One pointer exists per step invocation.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.StepIndex
member.summary: Zero-based index of the step within the workflow definition.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.AttemptCount
member.summary: Number of times this step has been attempted.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.RetryAfter
member.summary: When retrying, the pointer will not run before this time.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.EventName
member.summary: For event-waiting steps: the event name to wait for.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.EventKey
member.summary: For event-waiting steps: the correlation key.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.EventData
member.summary: Serialized event data received for this pointer.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.Error
member.summary: Human-readable error message from the last failed attempt.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionPointer.PersistenceData
member.summary: Step-scoped key/value bag persisted alongside the instance data.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult
member.summary: Discriminated union returned by a workflow step, telling the engine what to do next. Use the static factory methods to create the appropriate result.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.Next
member.summary: Step succeeded; advance to the next step immediately.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.Next(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Step succeeded; advance to the next step after a delay.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.Retry(System.TimeSpan,System.String)
member.summary: Step should be retried after the specified delay.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.Fail(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Step failed permanently; trigger saga compensation.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.Complete
member.summary: The workflow is complete — used as the terminal result of the last step.

member.name: M:SagaNet.Core.Models.ExecutionResult.WaitForEvent(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Suspend the workflow until an external event with the given name and key is received.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition
member.summary: Compiled, immutable definition of a single workflow step.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.StepType
member.summary: The CLR type that implements .

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.IsCompensatable
member.summary: True if the step also implements .

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.CompensateWithStepIndex
member.summary: Index of the compensation step to run if this step fails. Null means no explicit compensation (use instead).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Retry policy attached to this step (overrides global options).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.NextStepIndices
member.summary: Indices of subsequent steps (supports branching).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepDefinition.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Per-step retry configuration.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1
member.summary: Passed into each step at execution time, providing access to workflow state, the persistence layer, and cancellation.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.WorkflowInstanceId
member.summary: ID of the owning workflow instance.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.Data
member.summary: Mutable workflow data — changes are persisted after the step completes.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.Pointer
member.summary: The execution pointer for this step invocation.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.StepDefinition
member.summary: The step definition (name, retry policy, etc.).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.AttemptCount
member.summary: How many times this step has previously been attempted (0-based).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.CancellationToken
member.summary: Token that is cancelled when the host is shutting down.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepExecutionContext`1.PersistenceData
member.summary: Persistence provider for cross-step data (step-scoped key/value store).

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.MiddlewareContext
member.summary: Context passed to implementations.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.StepStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle status of an .

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowDefinition
member.summary: Compiled, immutable definition of a workflow — produced by .

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowDefinition.Description
member.summary: Optional description for tooling and diagnostics.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowEvent
member.summary: An external event that can resume a suspended workflow step.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance
member.summary: Runtime state of a single workflow execution.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.WorkflowName
member.summary: Matches the .

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.DataType
member.summary: CLR type name of the data payload, used for deserialization.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.DataJson
member.summary: JSON-serialized workflow data payload.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.ExecutionPointers
member.summary: Ordered list of execution pointers (one per step invocation).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation ID for distributed tracing integration.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.Error
member.summary: Terminal error message, set when status is Failed.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowInstance.RowVersion
member.summary: Optimistic concurrency token — prevents double execution across hosts.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions
member.summary: Global options for the SagaNet workflow engine. Configure via services.Configure<WorkflowOptions>() or the fluent builder.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.PollInterval
member.summary: How often the host polls for runnable workflow instances. Default: 500 ms.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.PollBatchSize
member.summary: Maximum number of workflow instances processed per poll cycle. Default: 10.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.MaxConcurrentWorkflows
member.summary: Degree of parallelism for executing workflow instances within a single poll cycle. Default: number of logical processors, capped at 16.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.DefaultRetryPolicy
member.summary: Default retry policy applied to all steps that do not specify their own.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.StepTimeout
member.summary: Maximum duration a single step may run before being cancelled. Default: 5 minutes.

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.EnableInstanceCleanup
member.summary: When true, completed workflow instances are soft-deleted after . Default: false (retain forever).

member.name: P:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowOptions.InstanceRetentionPeriod
member.summary: How long completed instances are retained before cleanup. Default: 30 days.

member.name: T:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle status of a .

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Runnable
member.summary: Created and ready to run on the next polling cycle.

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Running
member.summary: Currently being executed by a workflow host.

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Complete
member.summary: All steps completed successfully.

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Compensated
member.summary: A step failed and compensation was triggered (saga rollback).

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Failed
member.summary: A terminal failure — compensation was attempted but also failed.

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Suspended
member.summary: Waiting for an external event before continuing.

member.name: F:SagaNet.Core.Models.WorkflowStatus.Terminated
member.summary: Terminated externally before completion.
